# Migration Anti-Waste Score

| Waste category | Evidence | Score | Recommended action |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Reports without usage |  |  | Retire or replace |
| Low-value customizations |  |  | Retire candidate |
| Full history without business need |  |  | Archive/reporting history |
| Duplicate integrations |  |  | Consolidate |
| Old ISV dependency |  |  | Replace or retire |
